fact_nuggets.text: Speed Boost (Japanese: Speed Up) is an Ability introduced in Generation III.

Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD R B The Pokemon's Movement Speed accelerates. MD T D S Accelerates the Pokemon's Movement Speed. B S L MD GtI Unavailable S MD The Pokemon's Travel Speed goes up after a certain number of turns! MD RT DX The Pokemon's Travel Speed goes up sometimes.

Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] At the end of each turn, Speed Boost raises the Speed stat of the Pokemon with this Ability by one stage. Speed Boost will not activate on the turn the Pokemon with the Ability is switched in (even if it gains the Ability after switching in). It will activate if the Pokemon is switched in due to a previous Pokemon fainting. Starting from Generation V , Speed Boost will not activate at the end of the turn if the user failed to escape from a wild encounter during that turn. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Speed Boost has no effect outside of battle.

Raises Speed one stage after each turn.
